description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large, horizontal windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall and includes a spacious driveway leading to the main entrance. There is a visible backyard area with a patio or pool, suggesting outdoor leisure space. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and open-plan living, characteristic of contemporary urban homes.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious driveway, enclosed by a low wall and featuring a backyard patio or pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tiered two-story structure, backyard patio or pool, and the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, patio or pool, and the arrangement of windows and doors on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side windows, and the overall rectangular footprint of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, minimal steps, and a direct driveway approach, lacking decorative columns or overhangs.
